items.title: Nikola Jokic with an eighth-straight All-NBA Team nod, makes a sixth First Team. He and David Thompson (twice) are the lone players in Nuggets history to earn a First Team All-NBA honor.
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt: Nikola Jokic with an eighth-straight All-NBA Team nod, makes a sixth First Team. He and David Thompson (twice) are the lone players in Nuggets history to earn a First Team All-NBA honor.
